title: Crystal Sphere
description:
[/blue][/sine]

A [jitter]raspy[/jitter] voice calls out as you enter a [purple]mystic hut[/purple].

[sine][blue]
she says while bringing out pen and parchment.
conditions: All players have at least 100 Gold
notes: This event features a minigame where you reveal tiles in a crystal sphere. The [gold]Uncover Future[/gold] option has a variable cost: the base cost is 50 Gold, but an additional 1-49 Gold is added randomly at the start of the event (for a total of 51-99 Gold). The [gold]Payment Plan[/gold] option trades a [red]Debt[/red] curse for more divinations (6 instead of 3). Both options allow you to reveal tiles in the Crystal Sphere and receive items at the end of the session. Items are revealed progressively during the minigame.
